ocr_snippet: Though he continued to have fever spikes at 1 week of hospital stay, he improved symptomatically declining trend. Out by 5 of hospital stay, hence IV ceftriaxone was continued. Repeat crp was in declining trending on day 8 of antibiotics. IV antibiotics was changed to oral cefixime on day 8. Parents were explained regarding the nature of the disease, course and the need to continue oral antibiotics for a prescribed duration. Parents were counselled on hand hygiene and be being discharged with following advice.
